purpose: Source-near opportunity fields for AI-native startup and FDE analysis. These fields sit beside formal_tags and should not be used as broad topic labels.

buyer_or_user.role: Who appears to buy, deploy, operate, or directly use the AI system.

values.it_security_team: IT, security, governance, or platform team
values.healthcare_provider: Hospital, clinic, payer, or healthcare operator
values.insurance_team: Insurance claims, underwriting, or operations team
values.operations_team: Operations, logistics, supply-chain, or back-office team
values.content_team: Content, marketing, media, or CMS team

team_or_function.role: The business function where work is changing.

specific_task.role: The concrete workflow step or job-to-be-done mentioned or strongly implied by the source.

values.customer_ticket_triage: Ticket triage, routing, QA, or support resolution
values.sales_lead_research: Lead research, account research, or pipeline enrichment
values.sales_briefing: Sales briefing, call prep, or revenue-team coordination
values.contract_review: Contract review, clause extraction, or legal document work
values.knowledge_base_qa: Enterprise knowledge-base Q&A or retrieval workflow
values.code_review: Code review, coding agent, or software change workflow
values.internal_tool_building: Building internal tools, apps, or automations
values.model_deployment: Model deployment, inference, routing, or production rollout
values.cost_monitoring: AI cost, usage, rate-limit, or billing monitoring
values.permission_audit: Permissions, audit logs, access review, or agent governance
values.medical_documentation: Clinical documentation, imaging, or healthcare workflow
values.insurance_claim_review: Insurance claim review, adjudication, or underwriting
values.procurement_supplier_screening: Supplier screening, procurement intake, or sourcing
values.content_workflow: Content creation, CMS, publishing, or media workflow
values.data_analysis_query: Data analysis, analytics query, or business intelligence
values.call_transcription: Call transcription, summarization, or voice workflow
values.logistics_coordination: Shipment, logistics, dispatch, inventory, or supply-chain coordination

business_action.role: The observable business move in the source.

values.product_launch: Product, feature, model, API, or platform launch
values.customer_deployment: Customer deployment, rollout, pilot, case study, or adoption
values.partnership_integration: Partnership, integration, channel, or ecosystem move
values.procurement_signal: Procurement, public contract, RFP, or bidding signal
values.pricing_change: Pricing, packaging, cost, usage-limit, or billing change
values.research_benchmark: Benchmark, paper, evaluation, or research result
values.governance_requirement: Governance, regulation, security, or compliance requirement
values.hiring_fde: FDE, solution engineer, or customer-embedded delivery hiring
values.failure_postmortem: Shutdown, rollout failure, incident, or postmortem

product_form.role: The commercial shape a founder could learn from.

values.agent_workbench: Agent workbench or multi-agent collaboration surface
values.copilot: Copilot or assistant embedded into an existing workflow
values.model_gateway: Model gateway, router, proxy, or inference control layer
values.rag_knowledge_base: RAG, enterprise search, memory, or knowledge-base layer
values.vertical_saas: Vertical SaaS application for a named industry or function
values.developer_tool: Developer tool, coding agent, IDE, or software lifecycle tool
values.workflow_automation: Workflow automation or process orchestration product
values.evaluation_platform: Evaluation, benchmarking, observability, or testing platform
values.browser_or_desktop_tool: Browser, desktop, or local productivity tool

delivery_model.role: How the value appears to be packaged or delivered.

values.consulting_diagnostic: Consulting, audit, or diagnostic entry product

pain_or_constraint.role: The constraint that may create willingness to pay.

values.workflow_integration: Integration into existing workflow or systems
values.api_cost_spike: AI usage cost, inference cost, or billing pressure
values.permission_boundary: Permissions, data access, or responsibility boundary
values.audit_log_required: Audit log, traceability, or compliance record required
values.data_silo: Data silo, fragmented context, or missing knowledge layer
values.human_review_required: Human review, approval, or expert-in-the-loop required
values.latency_sensitive: Latency, reliability, or production performance constraint
values.model_routing_complexity: Model routing, vendor selection, or multi-model operations
values.evaluation_gap: Evaluation, QA, testing, or measurement gap

adoption_evidence.role: What kind of adoption evidence is actually visible from the source.

values.case_study: Case study, customer story, or deployment write-up
values.customer_metric: Customer outcome metric, usage number, or quantified result
values.deployment_scale: Deployment scale, seats, locations, users, or volume disclosed
values.procurement_contract: Procurement contract, RFP, tender, or public award
values.enterprise_plan: Enterprise plan, security plan, or governance package
values.usage_growth: Usage growth, ARR, revenue, or customer-count growth
values.pilot_or_poc: Pilot, POC, trial, or early rollout
values.third_party_report: Third-party report, industry report, or analyst evidence

source_evidence_type.role: The source form that supports the field assignment.

values.first_party_announcement: Company announcement, press release, docs, or blog
values.first_party_case: First-party case study or customer story
values.industry_report: Industry report, analyst report, or institutional report
values.technical_blog: Technical blog, developer doc, or engineering post
values.regulatory_or_procurement: Regulatory, procurement, government, or tender source
